step.title: Identify rollback triggers
step.action: Define the conditions that would trigger a rollback: error rate thresholds, health check failures, critical bugs.

step.title: Define rollback steps
step.action: Document the step-by-step rollback procedure: revert deployment, restore database, clear caches.

step.title: Verification commands
step.action: Define the commands and checks to verify a successful rollback: health endpoints, smoke tests, data integrity.

step.title: Produce rollback plan
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with rollback plan details.
